people.person: a group of people, including men in dark suits and a woman in a white shirt
people.action: walking away from the camera down a narrow, dimly lit corridor

scene.setting: a narrow, dimly lit corridor with white walls, a black metal railing on the left, and a green wall on the right. A single light fixture is visible on the wall.

visual_objective.visibility_notes: The scene is shot from behind the group, so their faces are not visible.

visual_expression.person: a man in a dark suit

audio_description: The audio features a dramatic, suspenseful musical score with a fast tempo.
emotion_description: The combination of the dark, confined setting and the tense music creates an atmosphere of suspense and anticipation.
